---
name: Accessibility barrier
about: Report something on the site that is hard or impossible to use with a keyboard, screen reader, magnifier, or other assistive technology.
title: "[a11y] "
labels: accessibility
---

Thanks for helping make the scorecard usable for everyone. You do not need to know
the technical standard — just describe what got in your way.

**Where did it happen?**
<!-- The page URL, or a description like "the agency search box" or "the map". -->

**What were you trying to do, and what went wrong?**
<!-- e.g. "I could not reach the theme menu with the keyboard" or
     "my screen reader did not announce the grade". -->

**What are you using?** (optional, but it helps a lot)
<!-- Browser + version, and any assistive technology (VoiceOver, NVDA, JAWS,
     zoom level, Windows High Contrast, etc.). -->

**How urgent is it for you?** (optional)
<!-- e.g. "I can't use the site at all" vs "minor annoyance". -->

---

We aim to acknowledge accessibility reports within a few business days. You can also
reach the maintainer through the contact link on https://chelseakr.com if you would
rather not file a public issue.
